calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants Frankenstitch Promotions, Llc And Adam Frank (Notices)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Continued To Jul-26-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants Frankenstitch Promotions, Llc And Adam Frank (Notices)
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 3:20 p.m. and concluding at 3:27 p.m.

Plaintiff Orion First Financial LLC. appearing represented by Mark Scott, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Frankenstitch Promotions, LLC. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MATTHEW JACOBS is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Orion First Financial LLC, and against Defendant Frankenstitch Promotions, LLC., as follows:

1. Damages: $62,193.45
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $1,075.75
4. Attorney fees: $2,283.38

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $65,552.58
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
